message:
fix: remove stale stderr assertion in TestInitDoltMetadataNoGit

TestInitDoltMetadataNoGit expected a warning about "upstream" or
"repository ID" when running bd init in a non-git directory. However,
bd init intentionally skips the upstream warning for brand-new repos
with no remotes (not noise-worthy), and ComputeRepoID() succeeds even
without remotes. The test still verifies the important behavior: dolt
directory created and no SQLite database created.

TestInitDatabaseFlag already passes (the --database flag exists).

Closes: bd-e0i1

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Executed-By: beads/polecats/obsidian

Role: polecats
